General.Name: New Horizon Aircraft Ltd
General.Description: New Horizon Aircraft Ltd., an aerospace original equipment manufacturer company, designs hybrid-electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft for the regional air mobility market in the United States. It focuses on the design and delivery of the Cavorite X7, a hybrid electric 7-seat aircraft that can take off and land vertically. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Lindsay, Canada.

7.Name: Mr. Phil  Kelly
7.Title: Senior Vice President of Business Development
